info.title: Infinispan REST API
info.description: Infinispan is a distributed, in-memory key/value data store. The REST API provides access to cache management, data operations, counters, cluster management, server configuration, cross-site replication, and monitoring.

post.description: Create a named cache with XML or JSON configuration

delete.description: Remove a cache from the cluster

get.description: Get configuration, stats, and details for a cache. Use action param: config, stats, health, distribution, keys, entries, size, detailed, get-mutable-attributes, get-availability, listen

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: Response format: application/xml, application/json, or application/yaml

parameters.name: full
parameters.description: Include value and type info for mutable attributes

post.description: Add an entry. Returns 204 on success, 409 if key exists

put.description: Replace an existing entry or create new

get.description: Retrieve data by key. Add ?extended for cluster info, ?action=distribution for entry distribution

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: Response format: application/xml, application/json, or application/yaml

post.description: Convert between XML, JSON, and YAML formats

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: Response format: application/xml, application/json, or application/yaml

post.description: Compare two cache configurations. Returns 204 if equal, 409 if different
Delete all data from a cache
Reset all statistics for a cache
Change a mutable cache configuration attribute
Assign an alias to a cache
Enable automatic rebalancing for a cache
Disable automatic rebalancing for a cache
Change cache availability (AVAILABLE or DEGRADED_MODE)
Define current topology as stable

get.description: Query cache with Ickle query language

post.description: Search with query in request body

delete.description: Delete entries matching an Ickle query

post.description: Rebuild indexes for a cache
Add new fields to existing index schema
Delete all indexes from a cache
Reset query statistics

get.description: Get status of all backup locations
Get status of a specific backup location

post.description: Take a backup location offline
Bring a backup location online
Push cache state to a backup location
Cancel state transfer to a site

get.description: Get state transfer status for all sites

post.description: Clear the state transfer status
Cancel state transfer on receiving site
Configure state transfer mode
Connect target cluster to source for rolling upgrade

head.description: Check if cache is connected to remote cluster

get.description: List all caches with statuses and details
List caches accessible for a role

post.description: Create a counter with configuration

get.description: Get the current value of a counter

post.description: Increment a counter value
Decrement a counter value
Reset a counter to initial value
Add a delta to the counter
Atomically set counter if current matches expected
Atomically swap counter value

get.description: Get health status of the cache manager

post.description: Gracefully shut down the entire cluster

get.description: Get data distribution across cluster nodes

post.description: Gracefully shut down the server

put.description: Set the log level for a logger

parameters.name: level
parameters.description: Log level: TRACE, DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR
